pages.text:
**Notarial Deed of Sale**

**Document ID:** sale_004
**Type:** Sale Deed (Verkoopakte / Acte de vente)
**Date of Deed:** 14 October 2020
**Place of Execution:** Bruges, Belgium
**Notary:** Meester Annelies De Smet, Bruges

---

**PARTIES:**

**SELLERS**
1. Mr. Hendrik Janssen, born on 15 March 1948, residing at [insert address], Bruges, Belgium,
2. Mrs. Maria Janssen-De Vos, born on 22 July 1951, residing at [insert address], Bruges, Belgium,

hereinafter referred to as the "Sellers".

**BUYERS**
1. Mr. Thomas Janssen, born on 9 November 1972, residing at [insert address], Bruges, Belgium,
2. Mrs. Sarah Janssen-Peeters, born on 4 February 1975, residing at [insert address], Bruges, Belgium,

hereinafter referred to as the "Buyers".

---

**RECITALS:**

WHEREAS, the Sellers are the lawful owners of the property located at Kerkstraat 12, 8000 Bruges,
Belgium, hereinafter referred to as the "Property", acquired by them through a purchase deed dated 12
September 1985, which is recorded under notarial reference [insert reference number], and which is duly
registered in the mortgage register of Bruges.

WHEREAS, the Sellers wish to transfer ownership of the Property to the Buyers, who are their children, for
the purpose of keeping the Property within the Janssen family.

WHEREAS, the parties acknowledge that the sale price of EUR 320,000 has been determined to be
favorable compared to the prevailing market value of similar properties, reflecting the familial
relationship and understanding that this transaction may be regarded as a partial advancement or
favorable treatment within the context of family support.

---

**NOW, THEREFORE, the parties hereby agree as follows:**

**ARTICLE 1 - OBJECT OF SALE**
The Sellers hereby sell and convey to the Buyers the Property described as follows:
- **Address:** Kerkstraat 12, 8000 Bruges, Belgium
- **Cadastral Reference:** Bruges, 1st division, section A, number 245/B

**ARTICLE 2 - ORIGIN OF TITLE**
The origin of title of the Property is established by the deed of purchase executed on 12 September 1985,
as referenced above. The Sellers affirm that they hold full and clear title to the Property, free from any
encumbrances or claims, except as may be disclosed in the aforementioned deed.

**ARTICLE 3 - SALE PRICE**
The total sale price for the Property is agreed upon at EUR 320,000 (three hundred twenty thousand
euros), payable in full by bank transfer at the time of signing of this deed.

**ARTICLE 4 - POSSESSION**
Possession of the Property shall be transferred to the Buyers immediately upon the execution of this
deed. The Sellers shall ensure that the Buyers receive peaceful possession of the Property, and the
Sellers warrant that there are no legal impediments to such possession.

**ARTICLE 5 - GUARANTEES**
The Sellers declare that they guarantee the Buyers against any eviction or claims of third parties
regarding the Property. The Sellers further agree to indemnify the Buyers for any costs, damages, or
liabilities arising from any claims against the Property that may have existed prior to the date of this
deed.

**ARTICLE 6 - URBAN PLANNING**
The Buyers acknowledge that they are aware of the urban planning regulations applicable to the
Property. The Sellers shall not be held responsible for any changes in urban planning that may affect the
Property following the date of this deed.

**ARTICLE 7 - FISCAL AND REGISTRATION MATTERS**
The Buyers shall be responsible for all taxes, duties, and registration fees arising from this transaction, in
accordance with applicable Belgian law. The Sellers shall cooperate in providing any necessary
documentation for the registration of this deed.

**ARTICLE 8 - COSTS**
The costs of this deed, including notarial fees and registration costs, shall be borne by the Buyers. The
Buyers acknowledge that they have received adequate information regarding the costs involved in this
transaction.

---

**CLOSING**
The parties hereby declare that they have read and understood the contents of this deed and agree to be
bound by its terms. This deed is executed in two (2) original copies, one for each party.

**SIGNATURES:**

Bruges, 14 October 2020

**For the Sellers:**
_________________________
Hendrik Janssen

_________________________
Maria Janssen-De Vos

**For the Buyers:**
_________________________
Thomas Janssen

_________________________
Sarah Janssen-Peeters

**Notary:**
_________________________
Meester Annelies De Smet
Bruges, Belgium

---

This document is a formal notarial deed and serves as evidence of the sale of the Property as described
herein.

Bruges, 14 October 2020

**For the Sellers:**
_________________________
Hendrik Janssen

_________________________
Maria Janssen-De Vos

**For the Buyers:**
_________________________
Thomas Janssen

_________________________
Sarah Janssen-Peeters

**Notary:**
_________________________
Meester Annelies De Smet
Bruges, Belgium

---

This document is a formal notarial deed and serves as evidence of the sale of the Property as described
herein.
